ddls:
CREATE TABLE "presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the presentation */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the presentation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the presentation in minutes */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the speakers table */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the tracks table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location or venue of the presentation */,
  "registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of attendees registered for the presentation */,
  "engagement_score" REAL /* Engagement score for the presentation (e.g., average rating, number of questions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the speaker */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the speaker */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the speaker */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the speaker */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (organizer, speaker, attendee) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the presentations table */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the presentations table */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the presentations table */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "questions_asked" INTEGER /* Number of questions asked during the presentation */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the presentation */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback comments from attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)

Number of attendees registered for the presentation
